examples.title: Pseudocode: Creating a Simple Swing GUI
examples.description: Demonstrates the basic steps to create a Swing GUI application
examples.code:
CREATE WINDOW
SET WINDOW TITLE
CREATE BUTTON
CREATE LABEL
ADD BUTTON TO WINDOW
ADD LABEL TO WINDOW
SET BUTTON CLICK EVENT HANDLER
SHOW WINDOW
examples.explanation: This pseudocode illustrates the fundamental steps to create a simple Swing GUI application, including creating a window, setting its title, adding a button and label, and handling the button click event.

examples.title: Java: Creating a Simple Swing GUI
examples.description: Demonstrates how to create a simple Swing GUI application in Java
examples.explanation: This Java code creates a simple Swing GUI application with a button and label. When the button is clicked, the label text changes.

examples.title: Java: Demonstrating Swing Component Hierarchy
examples.description: Illustrates the hierarchy of Swing components
examples.explanation: This Java code demonstrates the hierarchy of Swing components, including top-level containers (JFrame), intermediate containers (JPanel), and atomic components (JButton, JLabel, JTextField).
